name: e2e config: the design configures messaging and integration with queues and an anti-corruption layer
command:
cat > profile.json <<'JEOF'
{"complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"an online appointment booking app for a medical clinic","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"analytics","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"external-partner","data_cadence":"real-time"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile profile.json --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const P=p=>(j.pillars[p]||[]).map(c=>c.concern);const has=(p,c)=>P(p).includes(c);const src=(p,c)=>((j.pillars[p]||[]).find(x=>x.concern===c)||{}).source_id;process.exit(has("integration","message_queue")&&has("integration","dead_letter_queue")&&has("integration","outbox_pattern")&&has("integration","anti_corruption_layer")?0:1)' && echo messaging-config 1>&2
